narrative:
Clinton Township has 3,022 registered voters, with 67.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 9.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 13.1 percentage points.
